charon.egress.nginx_credproxy_template_s.reason: Deliberately inert Phase-2 placeholder. The credential-injecting nginx reverse proxy (Track C custody) is the NEXT unit after this Phase-1 egress-allowlist work; this stub returns a TODO string and is intentionally not wired until custody moves out of the process. Exercised by tests/test_egress_allowlist.py::test_nginx_credproxy_template_is_an_inert_phase2_stub, which asserts it stays inert.

charon.api.list_ledgers.reason: Called from charon.service.app (api.list_ledgers()) but that call site doesn't count: service/app.py is loaded by uvicorn via the string 'charon.service.app:app' (see service/__main__.py), which is invisible to static AST reachability, so the whole module reads as unreachable and this call cascades as a false positive.
